testcase.name: Sematic application renders the pipeline index page

failure.message: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Welcome to Sematic' but never did.

testcase.failure: AssertionError: Timed out retrying after 4000ms: Expected to find content: 'Welcome to Sematic' but never did. at Context.eval (webpack:///./e2e/main.cy.ts:4:7)
